name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements with expense reports instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: discrepancies between credit card statements and employee expense reports
